overall.description: A slow drift along a futuristic urban canal at dusk in a video game environment. The camera moves past a neon-lit tower toward a distant industrial complex, passing under a rocky overhang where debris falls into the water. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with warm pink skies and reflective water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban canal with neon-lit buildings

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting forward along the canal in a small watercraft, observing the neon-lit tower on the left

entered.detail: tall building with vertical red and green neon signage reflecting on the water
large industrial building with green illuminated windows in the distance
steep rocky shoreline with patches of grass and debris
calm water surface reflecting the pink sky and neon lights
dark concrete overpass structure extending from the rocky embankment over the canal

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide urban canal at dusk, with a pink sky reflecting on calm waters. A tall neon-lit tower dominates the left side while a rocky embankment rises on the right. The camera drifts slowly forward toward a distant green industrial complex, with no other visible activity.

events.description: debris falls from the overhang above into the water near the camera
entering the shadow cast by the concrete overhang, reducing natural light

agents.ego_description: continuing to drift forward under the overhang, navigating through the narrow waterway

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves under the rocky overhang, debris suddenly falls from above into the water. The lighting shifts from warm dusk to cooler shadows as the concrete structure blocks the sky. The neon tower recedes into the distance while the rocky walls close in on the right.

agents.ego_description: drifting deeper into the shadowed canal section, with limited light from the overhang entrance behind

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deep under the overhang where natural light is minimal. The canal becomes an enclosed, shadowy passage with the rocky wall pressing close on the right. The green industrial complex remains visible ahead as a distant goal, while the water reflects the dim ambient light from behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera drift along a futuristic urban canal that transitions from an open, neon-lit vista into a claustrophobic, shadowy passage. It begins under a pink dusk sky reflecting on calm waters, moving past a towering neon structure on the left toward a distant green industrial complex. As the camera glides beneath a rocky overhang, the warm light shifts into cooler shadows and debris falls from the concrete structure into the water. The scene then closes in as the rocky walls press tighter against the right side, eventually enveloping the camera in a dim, enclosed corridor. Finally, the canal becomes a dark passage where the only guiding light is the distant glow of the industrial complex ahead.
